disclaimer.title: Important Budget Note
disclaimer.text: This figure is a 'starting from' reference price. To give you an exact quote without commitment, we need to perform a free technical appraisal at your property. We want to give you the best real price.

large_scale.title: Large Scale Project
large_scale.text: For properties of this size, a chart doesn't do justice to the precision you deserve. We prefer to study your case personally to offer an optimized and professional proposal.

painting_note.title: About the Painting Service
painting_note.text: This price of 5€/m² applies to smooth walls and light colors. If the surface has defects, needs prior treatment, or dark colors, we will provide a free personalized valuation.

About.title: Construction with criteria. Management with commitment.
About.subtitle: About Us
About.story: JD Elite Builders arises from real knowledge of the environment and years of experience in the area. We understand that a property on the Costa del Sol needs more than a one-off renovation. It needs follow-up, prevention, and constant technical management.
About.satisfaction: That is why we accompany each owner with transparency, planning, and direct communication. Our goal is not to finish a project, but to maintain a long-term relationship of trust.

ServicePage.why_trust_text: With years of roots in Nerja and the Costa del Sol, we have consolidated a large and multidisciplinary technical team. We work exclusively with trusted professionals with proven experience in the area. This solid local infrastructure allows us to offer an agile, complete service with the guarantee that your property will always be in the best hands.
